testcase.name: Post values and validate

failure.message: APITestingWithCSV.feature:20 - evaluation (js) failed: baseURL, javax.script.ScriptException: ReferenceError: "baseURL" is not defined in <eval> at line number 1 stack trace: jdk.nashorn.api.scripting.NashornScriptEngine.throwAsScriptException(NashornScriptEngine.java:470)

testcase.failure:
* def crudPath1 = '/api/users' ............................................ passed * def crudPath2 = '/api/users/2' .......................................... passed * def javaUtils = Java.type('ReusableUtils.JavaUtils') .................... passed * def javaUtlObj = new javaUtils .......................................... passed * def completePath = ('Create' == 'Create') ? crudPath1 : crudPath2 ....... passed * def reqPayload = ........................................................ passed Given url baseURL ......................................................... failed
